Python.title: Python Basics
Python.description: Learn Python syntax, functions, collections, files, and object-oriented programming.

Python.title: Advanced Python
Python.description: Build production-ready Python skills with testing, APIs, concurrency, and design patterns.

SQL.title: SQL for Analytics
SQL.description: Query, join, aggregate, and analyze relational data using practical business datasets.

SQL.title: Advanced SQL and Databases
SQL.description: Master window functions, query optimization, indexing, and database design.

Data_Analyst.title: Data Analyst Career Path
Data_Analyst.description: Learn spreadsheets, SQL, Python, statistics, dashboards, and portfolio projects.

Data_Analyst.title: Data Visualization with Power BI
Data_Analyst.description: Create clear dashboards and communicate insights with Power BI.

Data_Analyst.title: SQL for Analytics
Data_Analyst.description: Develop the SQL skills used in day-to-day analytics roles.

Data_Scientist.title: Data Science Bootcamp
Data_Scientist.description: An end-to-end path through Python, statistics, data preparation, machine learning, and projects.

Data_Scientist.title: Machine Learning Specialization
Data_Scientist.description: Learn supervised and unsupervised learning through hands-on projects.

Data_Scientist.title: SQL for Analytics
Data_Scientist.description: Build the data-querying foundation every data scientist needs.

ML_Engineer.title: Machine Learning Specialization
ML_Engineer.description: Train, evaluate, and tune machine-learning models.

ML_Engineer.title: MLOps Engineering
ML_Engineer.description: Deploy, monitor, and maintain machine-learning systems in production.

ML_Engineer.title: Advanced Python
ML_Engineer.description: Strengthen the software engineering skills required for ML systems.

AI.title: AI Foundations
AI.description: Understand AI, search, reasoning, machine learning, neural networks, and responsible AI.

AI.title: Deep Learning with PyTorch
AI.description: Build neural networks for vision and natural-language tasks.

AI.title: Generative AI Fundamentals
AI.description: Explore transformers, large language models, prompting, and responsible applications.

Web_Development.title: Full-Stack Web Development
Web_Development.description: Build responsive applications with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, Flask, and databases.

Web_Development.title: Modern JavaScript
Web_Development.description: Learn modern JavaScript, the DOM, asynchronous code, and browser APIs.

Web_Development.title: Flask Web Applications
Web_Development.description: Create and deploy database-backed Python web applications.

Cloud_Computing.title: Cloud Computing Foundations

Cloud_Computing.title: AWS Solutions Fundamentals

Cloud_Computing.title: DevOps and CI/CD
Cloud_Computing.description: Automate builds, tests, releases, infrastructure, and monitoring.

Cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
Cybersecurity.description: Learn threats, defenses, networking, identity, cryptography, and security operations.

Cybersecurity.description: Practice legal penetration testing and vulnerability assessment in labs.
